title: Doflamingo Takes Dressrosa
description: Pages 11–15 focus on doflamingo takes dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as kyros's past, King Riku's rule, and Rebecca's family history reveal what Doflamingo stole from Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So... . . . . . SOMNAM- BULISM!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Cavendish would sub- Denly open his eyes while sleeping...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and become hakuba, a completely different man...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hakuba would commit his crimes and be chased out to sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But the one who became a pirate was Cavendish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: wow... what an unlucky guy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He doesn't deserve any sympathy...!! He reveals in his condition and the fame it brings him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Pitying him will only trip us up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Cavendish is already a prodigy at swordplay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But Hakuba is twice as strong, even.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: His predispo- sition to fall back asleep after appear- ing, though...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: is quite unsuitable for a contest- style match.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Rebecca can't have won!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Make sure she doesn't have a gun or some- thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The Finals!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: only she was able to see through Hakuba's swordplay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It wasn't dumb luck... but whatever happens...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I'm not giving up the Mera Mera No mi.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The finals, at last.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Fufuff- Fuffuffuf... Fuffu...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Did you see that, just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: That grand- daughter of yours has the devil's luck!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: The National Assembly

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I never would have thought you'd both show up in the Tourna- ment,

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Well, King Riku!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: A former King must really have his back against the wall for him to be going after a devil fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But the actions of your family today have become in- tolerable...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Rebecca....!!

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Violet as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Is today some sort of anniver- sary or what?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What you did this morning was more than enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: The matter of his resign- nation from the Shichibi- Kai...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: ...was a false report.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: For me to ke- ep fighting for this country and everything it stands for!! That's all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: ...that may be your reason...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: But it's not Viola's....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: She's got a knack for foresight....!! So she's made a wager!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I've been expecting the new shichibukai to come and oppose me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Trafalgar Law!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: and with teacher-ous blood in his veins, the "man of the hour" from two years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...Monkey D. Luffy! They've formed a pirate alliance designed to take me down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: But Law is already, well, as you can see...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: And Strawhat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Won't be leaving the colosseum as a human....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: And as for their move- ments at the present...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: The Strawhat Crew's CyBorg Franky...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: is attacking the toy house alone.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: but can he really hope to match my officers...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: The remain- ing strawhat "pieces" are pirate Hunter zero...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: kin'Emon of the Foxfire, Nico Robin, and sogeking. Just those four.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The toy house and the Palace entrance....

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Besides those two routes, there are no other ways into the factory....!!

summary: Doflamingo Takes Dressrosa focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as kyros's past, King Riku's rule, and Rebecca's family history reveal what Doflamingo stole from Dressrosa.
